Anton has 35 years old. He has dark brow hair and green eyes. He is very tall and quite fit, with broad shoulders. He has large aquiline nose. Distant. Intelligent. Cold but clumsy towards woman he likes. Not intrested in other women. Faithful. Not romantic.
